# Fixture Test Act

Preamble only line before sections.

Section 1. Short title and commencement.
This Act may be called the Fixture Test Act.
It extends to the whole of India.

Section 2. Definitions.
In this Act, "person" means any natural person.
"Day" means a day reckoned in accordance with the Gregorian calendar.
